template_data.label_above: Annual spend through GSA Multiple Award Schedule contracts
template_data.context_html: Goes to companies already on the Schedule — not the ones who planned to apply someday.

image_headline: THE LIST THAT GETS THE MONEY
image_prompt: Infographic stat layout. Dark navy background. Bold headline top: 'THE LIST THAT GETS THE MONEY'. Center: large '$30B+' in bright green accent, with label above 'GSA SCHEDULE SPEND'. Left side: illustrated professional man in blazer reviewing a contract document, looking confident. Right side: three short labels with icons — 'ON CONTRACT' with green check, 'IN THE ROOM' with green check, 'POSITIONED' with green check. Bottom dark banner with short text. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
